name: Granite Speech 4.1 2B — Batch (no biasing) on Gold-92
short_description: Per-clip STT predictions from IBM Granite Speech 4.1 2B in batch mode with no keyword biasing on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Unbiased baseline for the keyword-biasing ablation.
model_description: ibm-granite/granite-speech-4.1-2b, GraniteSpeechForConditionalGeneration, HuggingFace Transformers 4.57.6, GPU bfloat16, no vocabulary biasing

files.description: Per-clip STT predictions on all 93 gold-92 benchmark clips. Each line: clip_id, hypothesis, latency_seconds.
